tv.generator-info-name: WebGrab+Plus/w MDB & REX Postprocess -- version V5.5.0.0 -- Jan van Straaten

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: 20-Squad races to find a missing child who was abducted from her front yard. Also, Hicks is faced with a difficult decision concerning Gamble.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth finally makes it as a true New Yorker when she is summoned to jury duty.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: The Fly Team meets Supervisory Special Agent Wesley 'Wes' Mitchell when his partner is shot in LA.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: When Red is identified as a possible hostage during a deli robbery in Philadelphia, Dembe and Ressler take action.

programme.title: THE RAINMAKER
programme.desc: Fresh out of law school, Rudy Baylor confronts Leo F. Drummond in a medical malpractice case.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo's baby girl has arrived, it's clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Celebrity Christmas curators Dirk and DeeDee Dashers go from tinsel to tragedy after Dirk is killed.

programme.title: THE AMAZING RACE
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dublin, Ireland, where they must complete four challenges in the penultimate leg.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to move on from the corruption scandal, a heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: 20-Squad contends with a hostage crisis. Also, Hondo receives a family visit.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Celebrity Christmas curators Dirk and DeeDee Dashers go from tinsel to tragedy after Dirk is killed.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: When Red is identified as a possible hostage during a deli robbery in Philadelphia, Dembe and Ressler take action.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to move on from the corruption scandal, a heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: 20-Squad contends with a hostage crisis. Also, Hondo receives a family visit.

programme.title: THE AMAZING RACE
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dublin, Ireland, where they must complete four challenges in the penultimate leg.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth finally makes it as a true New Yorker when she is summoned to jury duty.

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: Lena's pursuit of justice forces Danny into an unexpected role reversal, while Sarah faces a personal dilemma that tests her resolve.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: The Fly Team meets Supervisory Special Agent Wesley 'Wes' Mitchell when his partner is shot in LA.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo's baby girl has arrived, it's clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: 20-Squad races to find a missing child who was abducted from her front yard. Also, Hicks is faced with a difficult decision concerning Gamble.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: THE RAINMAKER
programme.desc: Fresh out of law school, Rudy Baylor confronts Leo F. Drummond in a medical malpractice case.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: While working undercover for 20-Squad, Alfaro encounters associates from a previous undercover case in Long Beach, embarking on a dangerous mission that stirs up unresolved issues from the past.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth is thrown into the world of television after a showrunner is brutally murdered.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: The Fly Team works quickly to find out who took the U.S. ambassador under hostage.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: Dembe reflects on his complicated past when he receives a concerning call from an old connection. An ambitious Congressman begins to question the Task Force's operations.

programme.title: RED EYE
programme.desc: Nolan recounts the events in Beijing, and Hana continues to probe the events on-board.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: With the 15 Division restructuring looming, Andy and Sam's wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: 20-Squad races to find a missing child who was abducted from her front yard. Also, Hicks is faced with a difficult decision concerning Gamble.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: Dembe reflects on his complicated past when he receives a concerning call from an old connection. An ambitious Congressman begins to question the Task Force's operations.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth finally makes it as a true New Yorker when she is summoned to jury duty.

programme.desc: Fresh out of law school, Rudy Baylor confronts Leo F. Drummond in a medical malpractice case.

programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo's baby girl has arrived, it's clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.desc: 20-Squad races to find a missing child who was abducted from her front yard. Also, Hicks is faced with a difficult decision concerning Gamble.

programme.desc: Elsbeth finally makes it as a true New Yorker when she is summoned to jury duty.

programme.desc: Dembe reflects on his complicated past when he receives a concerning call from an old connection. An ambitious Congressman begins to question the Task Force's operations.

programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo's baby girl has arrived, it's clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.desc: 20-Squad races to find a missing child who was abducted from her front yard. Also, Hicks is faced with a difficult decision concerning Gamble.

programme.desc: Fresh out of law school, Rudy Baylor confronts Leo F. Drummond in a medical malpractice case.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth is thrown into the world of television after a showrunner is brutally murdered.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: The Fly Team works quickly to find out who took the U.S. ambassador under hostage.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: With the 15 Division restructuring looming, Andy and Sam's wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: While working undercover for 20-Squad, Alfaro encounters associates from a previous undercover case in Long Beach, embarking on a dangerous mission that stirs up unresolved issues from the past.

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Marine who had recently been handpicked for a classified mission.

programme.title: RED EYE
programme.desc: Nolan recounts the events in Beijing, and Hana continues to probe the events on-board.

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Marine who had recently been handpicked for a classified mission.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: During a hiking trip, Powell and Gamble stumble upon an illegal weed farm and find themselves taking on a dangerous cartel.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: When a young man is found dead in his car, Elsbeth visits the holistic wellness center.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: An American teenager disappears from a party during her senior year trip to Portugal.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: While accompanying Red on a series of unusual tasks, Siya learns more about Meera's past. Congressman Hudson attempts to persuade a powerful friend to join his crusade against The Task Force.

programme.title: LONG BRIGHT RIVER
programme.desc: An unlikely ambush leaves Mickey reeling and pauses Mickey's hunt for Kacey. Mickey and Truman's bond deepens as they spend holiday time together with Thomas.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the assaults in the explosive season five finale, the team must now try to understand why they were targeted and if there is a bigger plan in place.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: The Fly Team works quickly to find out who took the U.S. ambassador under hostage.

programme.title: CORONER
programme.desc: Jenny assists Donovan on a case that brings them into the world of true crime podcasts. Their challenge: how do you solve a murder with no body?

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: While working undercover for 20-Squad, Alfaro encounters associates from a previous undercover case in Long Beach, embarking on a dangerous mission that stirs up unresolved issues from the past.

programme.desc: While accompanying Red on a series of unusual tasks, Siya learns more about Meera's past. Congressman Hudson attempts to persuade a powerful friend to join his crusade against The Task Force.

programme.desc: Elsbeth is thrown into the world of television after a showrunner is brutally murdered.

programme.desc: Jenny assists Donovan on a case that brings them into the world of true crime podcasts. Their challenge: how do you solve a murder with no body?

programme.desc: With the 15 Division restructuring looming, Andy and Sam's wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah.

programme.desc: Elsbeth is thrown into the world of television after a showrunner is brutally murdered.

programme.desc: While accompanying Red on a series of unusual tasks, Siya learns more about Meera's past. Congressman Hudson attempts to persuade a powerful friend to join his crusade against The Task Force.

programme.desc: With the 15 Division restructuring looming, Andy and Sam's wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah.

programme.desc: When a young man is found dead in his car, Elsbeth visits the holistic wellness center.

programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Marine who had recently been handpicked for a classified mission.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: An American teenager disappears from a party during her senior year trip to Portugal.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the assaults in the explosive season five finale, the team must now try to understand why they were targeted and if there is a bigger plan in place.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: During a hiking trip, Powell and Gamble stumble upon an illegal weed farm and find themselves taking on a dangerous cartel.

programme.title: DOC
programme.desc: Amy treats a chaplain who helps her reconcile with the past and Michael is under investigation for his actions during the hostage crisis..

programme.title: LONG BRIGHT RIVER
programme.desc: An unlikely ambush leaves Mickey reeling and pauses Mickey's hunt for Kacey. Mickey and Truman's bond deepens as they spend holiday time together with Thomas.

programme.title: DOC
programme.desc: Amy treats a chaplain who helps her reconcile with the past and Michael is under investigation for his actions during the hostage crisis..

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When violent robbers loot a museum vault, fleeing with almost a billion dollars in treasure recovered from a sunken ship, Hondo and 20-Squad must chase down the thieving killers.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: The Van Ness case continues to cause trouble for Elsbeth.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: The deputy inspector general calls on Tate to take on her first undercover field mission.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: The Task Force investigates the whereabouts of a missing newlywed. Red offers his help to a powerful cartel leader while Siya visits a connection from her mother's past.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team is thrown into a highly political case after four members of the Taliban are shot and one is kidnapped in New York with no record of their entrance into the country.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: The team comes together to celebrate John and Bailey's wedding; meanwhile, Celina discovers a discrepancy in her case, leading to a new discovery. Elsewhere, Lucy and Tim's relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: An American teenager disappears from a party during her senior year trip to Portugal.

programme.title: LONG BRIGHT RIVER
programme.desc: An unlikely ambush leaves Mickey reeling and pauses Mickey's hunt for Kacey. Mickey and Truman's bond deepens as they spend holiday time together with Thomas.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: During a hiking trip, Powell and Gamble stumble upon an illegal weed farm and find themselves taking on a dangerous cartel.

programme.title: CYRIL: SIMPLY MAGIC
programme.desc: Join Cyril on a journey of self-discovery in various locations across Asia as he shares the marvels of his magic.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: When a young man is found dead in his car, Elsbeth visits the holistic wellness center.

programme.title: LONG BRIGHT RIVER
programme.desc: An unlikely ambush leaves Mickey reeling and pauses Mickey's hunt for Kacey. Mickey and Truman's bond deepens as they spend holiday time together with Thomas.

programme.desc: In the aftermath of the assaults in the explosive season five finale, the team must now try to understand why they were targeted and if there is a bigger plan in place.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: The Van Ness case continues to cause trouble for Elsbeth.

programme.title: DOC
programme.desc: Amy treats a chaplain who helps her reconcile with the past and Michael is under investigation for his actions during the hostage crisis..

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: The deputy inspector general calls on Tate to take on her first undercover field mission.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: The team comes together to celebrate John and Bailey's wedding; meanwhile, Celina discovers a discrepancy in her case, leading to a new discovery. Elsewhere, Lucy and Tim's relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When violent robbers loot a museum vault, fleeing with almost a billion dollars in treasure recovered from a sunken ship, Hondo and 20-Squad must chase down the thieving killers.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team is thrown into a highly political case after four members of the Taliban are shot and one is kidnapped in New York with no record of their entrance into the country.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: After his partner Tom and family are killed by the infamous and elusive assassin Rogue, FBI agent Jack Crawford becomes obsessed with revenge as his world unravels into a vortex of guilt and betrayal.

programme.title: JURASSIC WORLD: DOMINION
programme.desc: With Earth once again dominated by prehistoric predators, two generations of heroes must unite for a globe-spanning adventure to shape the destiny of humans and dinosaurs.

programme.title: CYRIL: SIMPLY MAGIC
programme.desc: Join Cyril on a journey of self-discovery in various locations across Asia as he shares the marvels of his magic.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth is thrown into the world of television after a showrunner is brutally murdered.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: The team comes together to celebrate John and Bailey's wedding; meanwhile, Celina discovers a discrepancy in her case, leading to a new discovery. Elsewhere, Lucy and Tim's relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: CORONER
programme.desc: A victim causes a building lockdown and Jenny is forced to team up with a former colleague. Detective McAvoy is on the trail of a newly released inmate, determined to make his freedom short-lived.

programme.title: CORONER
programme.desc: In the season one finale, a death hits close to home for the team.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail's relationship with her brother, Steve Peck, is put to the test in the search for the shooter.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA's corruption investigation into 15 Division.

programme.title: JURASSIC WORLD: DOMINION
programme.desc: With Earth once again dominated by prehistoric predators, two generations of heroes must unite for a globe-spanning adventure to shape the destiny of humans and dinosaurs.

programme.title: CYRIL: SIMPLY MAGIC
programme.desc: Join Cyril on a journey of self-discovery in various locations across Asia as he shares the marvels of his magic.

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: Lena's pursuit of justice forces Danny into an unexpected role reversal, while Sarah faces a personal dilemma that tests her resolve.

programme.title: SIGHT UNSEEN
programme.desc: Jake and Tess investigate the shooting of a trucker when the Vice Squad shows up, demanding they cut their main suspect loose before they compromise one of Vice's investigations.

programme.title: LONG BRIGHT RIVER
programme.desc: An unlikely ambush leaves Mickey reeling and pauses Mickey's hunt for Kacey. Mickey and Truman's bond deepens as they spend holiday time together with Thomas.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: DOC
programme.desc: Amy treats a chaplain who helps her reconcile with the past and Michael is under investigation for his actions during the hostage crisis..

programme.desc: Jake and Tess investigate the shooting of a trucker when the Vice Squad shows up, demanding they cut their main suspect loose before they compromise one of Vice's investigations.

programme.desc: The team is thrown into a highly political case after four members of the Taliban are shot and one is kidnapped in New York with no record of their entrance into the country.

programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: Danny and Lena's investigation into a robbery gone wrong quickly turns personal, pushing Lena to devise a bold plan that tests Mae's boundaries.

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Marine who had recently been handpicked for a classified mission.

programme.title: XXX
programme.desc: A former extreme sports athlete is recruited by the government for a special undercover mission.

programme.desc: The Van Ness case continues to cause trouble for Elsbeth.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Elsbeth is thrown into the world of television after a showrunner is brutally murdered.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15's evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky -career-ending -plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to move on from the corruption scandal, a heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: Danny and Lena's investigation into a robbery gone wrong quickly turns personal, pushing Lena to devise a bold plan that tests Mae's boundaries.

programme.desc: Jenny assists Donovan on a case that brings them into the world of true crime podcasts. Their challenge: how do you solve a murder with no body?

programme.desc: Jake and Tess investigate the shooting of a trucker when the Vice Squad shows up, demanding they cut their main suspect loose before they compromise one of Vice's investigations.

programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.desc: A former extreme sports athlete is recruited by the government for a special undercover mission.

programme.desc: A victim causes a building lockdown and Jenny is forced to team up with a former colleague. Detective McAvoy is on the trail of a newly released inmate, determined to make his freedom short-lived.

programme.desc: In the season one finale, a death hits close to home for the team.

programme.desc: Danny and Lena's investigation into a robbery gone wrong quickly turns personal, pushing Lena to devise a bold plan that tests Mae's boundaries.

programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Marine who had recently been handpicked for a classified mission.

programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.desc: Amy treats a chaplain who helps her reconcile with the past and Michael is under investigation for his actions during the hostage crisis..

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: Danny and Lena's investigation into a robbery gone wrong quickly turns personal, pushing Lena to devise a bold plan that tests Mae's boundaries.

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Marine who had recently been handpicked for a classified mission.

programme.title: AMBULANCE (2022)
programme.desc: In this action thriller directed by Michael Bay, desperate brothers hijack an ambulance after their heist goes awry, spiraling into the most insane escape LA has ever seen.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: John Nolan, LAPD's oldest rookie, nears the end of training and faces his toughest test yet, reckoning with choices made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: SWAT's anti-terror sting operation at a bus station is thrown into chaos when volatile felons, fleeing the police, burst in and take the bus station hostage.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Sparks fly between Elsbeth and a handsome Scottish musician named Angus.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: The Fly Team heads to Poland to track down the mastermind behind a kidnapping.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: In an effort to prove their worth to Congressman Hudson, Red provides The Task Force with three criminal cases that are deeper than they appear. Ressler helps a friend make amends.

programme.title: CYRIL: SIMPLY MAGIC
programme.desc: Join Cyril on a journey of self-discovery in various locations across Asia as he shares the marvels of his magic.

programme.title: THE RAINMAKER
programme.desc: Rudy and Deck have a tense encounter with a witness and make a crucial discovery about their client.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: Nolan and Bailey's honeymoon is more of a nightmare than dream when it turns into an active crime scene. Meanwhile, Tim and Celina partner up and must uncover the identity of a John Doe.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the assaults in the explosive season five finale, the team must now try to understand why they were targeted and if there is a bigger plan in place.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: The Van Ness case continues to cause trouble for Elsbeth.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: The deputy inspector general calls on Tate to take on her first undercover field mission.

programme.desc: The team is thrown into a highly political case after four members of the Taliban are shot and one is kidnapped in New York with no record of their entrance into the country.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When violent robbers loot a museum vault, fleeing with almost a billion dollars in treasure recovered from a sunken ship, Hondo and 20-Squad must chase down the thieving killers.

programme.desc: The team is thrown into a highly political case after four members of the Taliban are shot and one is kidnapped in New York with no record of their entrance into the country.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: The team comes together to celebrate John and Bailey's wedding; meanwhile, Celina discovers a discrepancy in her case, leading to a new discovery. Elsewhere, Lucy and Tim's relationship is put to the test.

programme.desc: When violent robbers loot a museum vault, fleeing with almost a billion dollars in treasure recovered from a sunken ship, Hondo and 20-Squad must chase down the thieving killers.

programme.desc: In an effort to prove their worth to Congressman Hudson, Red provides The Task Force with three criminal cases that are deeper than they appear. Ressler helps a friend make amends.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE
programme.desc: The team comes together to celebrate John and Bailey's wedding; meanwhile, Celina discovers a discrepancy in her case, leading to a new discovery. Elsewhere, Lucy and Tim's relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: When violent robbers loot a museum vault, fleeing with almost a billion dollars in treasure recovered from a sunken ship, Hondo and 20-Squad must chase down the thieving killers.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team is thrown into a highly political case after four members of the Taliban are shot and one is kidnapped in New York with no record of their entrance into the country.

programme.title: ELSBETH
programme.desc: Sparks fly between Elsbeth and a handsome Scottish musician named Angus.

programme.title: SIGHT UNSEEN
programme.desc: When Lucas (Alec Santos) comes to Tess' (Dolly Lewis) apartment in the middle of the night claiming he just needs a place to crash, Tess is quick to realize something is up.

programme.title: FBI: INTERNATIONAL
programme.desc: The Fly Team heads to Poland to track down the mastermind behind a kidnapping.

programme.title: KUNG FU HUSTLE
programme.desc: A petty thief aspires to become a member of the notorious Axe Gang during the 1940s in Canton, China.

programme.title: THE SUPER MARIO BROS. MOVIE
programme.desc: The Super Mario Bros. Movie follows Mario and Luigi on a whirlwind adventure through Mushroom Kingdom, uniting with a cast of familiar characters to defeat Bowser.

programme.title: BOSTON BLUE
programme.desc: Danny and Lena's investigation into a robbery gone wrong quickly turns personal, pushing Lena to devise a bold plan that tests Mae's boundaries.
